title: valerianella rimosa var. auricula
intro: Valerianella rimosa var. auricula, also known as the auricled cornspurry, is a species of plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Valerianella rimosa var. auricula include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
